response:
Here are some of the most iconic and catchy **hit song lyrics** from different genres and eras. These lines have resonated with millions of fans worldwide:

---

### **Pop & Mainstream Hits**
1. **"Billie Jean" – Michael Jackson**
   *"Billie Jean is not my lover / She's just a girl who claims that I am the one"*

2. **"Rolling in the Deep" – Adele**
   *"We could have had it all / Rolling in the deep"*

3. **"Blank Space" – Taylor Swift**
   *"Got a long list of ex-lovers / They'll tell you I'm insane"*

4. **"Uptown Funk" – Mark Ronson ft. Bruno Mars**
   *"Don't believe me, just watch!"*

5. **"Shape of You" – Ed Sheeran**
   *"I'm in love with the shape of you / We push and pull like a magnet do"*

6. **"Bad Guy" – Billie Eilish**
   *"I'm the bad guy, duh"*

7. **"Levitating" – Dua Lipa ft. DaBaby**
   *"If you wanna run away with me, I know a galaxy"*

8. **"Watermelon Sugar" – Harry Styles**
   *"Tastes like strawberries on a summer evenin'"*

9. **"Stay" – The Kid LAROI & Justin Bieber**
   *"I do the same thing I told you that I never would"*

10. **"As It Was" – Harry Styles**
   *"You know it's not the same as it was"*

---

### **Hip-Hop & Rap Hits**
11. **"Lose Yourself" – Eminem**
   *"His palms are sweaty, knees weak, arms are heavy"*

12. **"Sicko Mode" – Travis Scott ft. Drake**
   *"Sun is down, freezin' cold / That's how we already know winter's here"*

13. **"God's Plan" – Drake**
   *"They wishin' on me, blessings on blessings"*

14. **"Old Town Road" – Lil Nas X ft. Billy Ray Cyrus**
   *"I got the horses in the back / Horse tack is attached"*

15. **"HUMBLE." – Kendrick Lamar**
   *"I'm so fuckin' sick and tired of the Photoshop"*

16. **"Mo Bamba" – Sheck Wes**
   *"I been ballin' so damn hard, got a plug for the work"*

17. **"Drip Too Hard" – Lil Baby & Gunna**
   *"I been countin' up, watch how fast I flip"*

18. **"Rockstar" – DaBaby ft. Roddy Ricch**
   *"I'm a rockstar, I'm a rockstar"*

19. **"The Box" – Roddy Ricch**
   *"I might pull up in a Hellcat / I might pull up in a Wraith"*

20. **"Savage" – Megan Thee Stallion**
   *"I'm a savage / Classy, bougie, ratchet"*

---

### **Rock & Classic Hits**
21. **"Bohemian Rhapsody" – Queen**
   *"Mama, just killed a man / Put a gun against his head, pulled my trigger, now he's dead"*

22. **"Sweet Child O’ Mine" – Guns N’ Roses**
   *"She's got a smile that it seems to me / Reminds me of childhood memories"*

23. **"Smells Like Teen Spirit" – Nirvana**
   *"Here we are now, entertain us / I feel stupid and contagious"*

24. **"Hotel California" – Eagles**
   *"You can check out any time you like / But you can never leave"*

25. **"Livin’ on a Prayer" – Bon Jovi**
   *"Woah, we're halfway there / Woah, livin' on a prayer"*

26. **"Don’t Stop Believin’" – Journey**
   *"Don't stop believin' / Hold on to that feelin'"*

27. **"Sweet Home Alabama" – Lynyrd Skynyrd**
   *"Big wheels keep on turnin' / Carry me home to see my kin"*

28. **"Back in Black" – AC/DC**
   *"Back in black / I hit the sack"*

29. **"Stairway to Heaven" – Led Zeppelin**
   *"There's a lady who's sure all that glitters is gold"*

30. **"Imagine" – John Lennon**
   *"Imagine there's no heaven / It's easy if you try"*

---

### **R&B & Soul Hits**
31. **"I Will Always Love You" – Whitney Houston**
   *"If I should stay / I would only be in your way"*

32. **"No Diggity" – Blackstreet ft. Dr. Dre & Queen Pen**
   *"I like the way you work it / No diggity, I got to bag it up"*

33. **"Crazy in Love" – Beyoncé ft. Jay-Z**
   *"Got me looking so crazy right now, your love's got me looking so crazy right now"*

34. **"Adorn" – Miguel**
   *"Let my love adorn you / Let my love adorn you"*

35. **"Redbone" – Childish Gambino**
   *"Stay woke / N****s creepin'"*

36. **"Super Bass" – Nicki Minaj**
   *"Boy, you got my heartbeat runnin' away"*

37. **"We Belong Together" – Mariah Carey**
   *"When you left me, I lost my way / The pain cut me like a knife"*

38. **"Untitled (How Does It Feel)" – D’Angelo**
   *"How does it feel / To be without, without"*

39. **"Fallin’" – Alicia Keys**
   *"I keep on fallin' / In and out of love with you"*

40. **"Cry Me a River" – Justin Timberlake**
   *"You don't have to say what you did / I already know, I found out"*

---

### **Country & Folk Hits**
41. **"Friends in Low Places" – Garth Brooks**
   *"I've got friends in low places / Where the whiskey drowns and the beer chases my blues away"*

42. **"Jolene" – Dolly Parton**
   *"Jolene, Jolene, Jolene, Jolene / I'm begging you, please don't take my man"*

43. **"Take Me Home, Country Roads" – John Denver**
   *"Almost heaven, West Virginia / Blue Ridge Mountains, Shenandoah River"*

44. **"The Dance" – Garth Brooks**
   *"I could have missed the pain / But I'd have had to miss the dance"*

45. **"Before He Cheats" – Carrie Underwood**
   *"I dug my key into the side / Of his pretty little souped-up four-wheel drive"*

46. **"Wagon Wheel" – Darius Rucker (Old Crow Medicine Show)**
   *"Rock me mama like a wagon wheel / Rock me mama any way you feel"*

47. **"Chattahoochee" – Alan Jackson**
   *"Way down yonder on the Chattahoochee / It gets hotter than a hoochie coochie"*

48. **"Ring of Fire" – Johnny Cash**
   *"Love is a burning thing / And it makes a fiery ring"*

49. **"Man! I Feel Like a Woman!" – Shania Twain**
   *"The best thing about bein' a woman / Is the prerogative to have a little fun"*

50. **"Tennessee Whiskey" – Chris Stapleton**
   *"You're as smooth as Tennessee whiskey / You're as sweet as strawberry wine"*

---

### **EDM & Dance Hits**
51. **"Titanium" – David Guetta ft. Sia**
   *"You shoot me down, but I won't fall / I am titanium"*

52. **"Levels" – Avicii**
   *"Oh, sometimes I get a good feeling, yeah / I get a feeling that I never, never, never, never had before"*

53. **"Animals" – Martin Garrix**
   *"We are the animals / We are the animals"*

54. **"Wake Me Up" – Avicii**
   *"Feeling my way through the darkness / Guided by a beating heart"*

55. **"Sandstorm" – Darude**
   *"[Instrumental drop – iconic melody]"*

56. **"One Kiss" – Calvin Harris & Dua Lipa**
   *"One kiss is all it takes / Fallin' in love with me"*

57. **"Faded" – Alan Walker**
   *"Where are you now? / Where are you now?"*

58. **"The Nights" – Avicii**
   *"One day, you'll leave this world behind / So live a life you will remember"*

59. **"Tremor" – Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike ft. Martin Garrix**
   *"[Big room EDM drop – no lyrics, just vibes]"*

60. **"Don’t Let Me Down" – The Chainsmokers ft. Daya**
   *"Don't let me down / Don't let me down"*

---

### **K-Pop & Global Hits**
61. **"Dynamite" – BTS**
